title: crambe gigantea
intro: Crambe gigantea, also known as giant sea fennel, is a type of plant in the cabbage family (Brassicaceae) that is native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to treat a range of health issues. The plant has been used to treat conditions such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds, as well as to reduce fever and alleviate menstrual cramps. Crambe gigantea can be prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in herbal remedies such as tinctures and ointments, making it a versatile and valuable medicinal plant.
